composer.placeholder: What do you want to share with the network?

follows.searchHint: There's no central directory: search combines who you follow with people discovered through "friend of a friend" (who they follow).
follows.emptyList: You're not following anyone yet. Paste someone's public key above.

feed.emptyWithoutFollows: No posts yet. Publish something or follow someone by public key.

search.noUsersKnown: No known users yet — follow someone to start discovering the network.

about.title: 100% distributed architecture
about.identity: Identity: Ed25519 key pair generated locally — no signup, no server, no username.
about.distribution: Content distribution: WebTorrent. Posts are grouped into "chapters" (concentrated torrents) instead of 1 torrent per post.
about.discovery: Discovery: Kademlia DHT (BEP44), signed mutable item pointing to each person's latest chapter.
about.integrity: Integrity/history: signed personal hash-chain — each post references the previous post's hash and is signed with your private key.
about.userSearch: User search: without a signup server, new user discovery happens through friend-of-a-friend gossip — each pointer published to the DHT includes your display name and a sample of who you follow, allowing your followers to discover people in your network.
about.speed: Speed: automatic reseeding (every peer downloading becomes a seeder), multiple trackers + DHT + PEX + LSD, adaptive polling based on window focus, prioritized media chunk selection.

backup.title: 💾 Backup & Recovery
backup.exportHint: Creates an encrypted ZIP file with your identity, posts, and settings. You can use this file to restore your account on another device.
backup.importHint: Restores your identity, posts, and settings from a previous backup file. Your current account will be replaced.
